name: Graceful Ember
author: ImAsra
description: Inspired by Bad Omens - THE DEATH OF PEACE OF MIND. Elegant neumorphic light theme with radiant red-orange accents over a warm, comforting cream canvas.

1.4.1: Bug reported by Legislate3030 on github.
Fix: row controls (favorite/heart, star rating, bulk-select checkbox, preview) inside track rows can be clicked reliably again.
The press animation was scaling the whole row on :active, which shifted controls out from under the cursor mid-click and silently swallowed the click.
Fix: sidebar collapse button and queue resizer handle no longer shift out from under the cursor on press.
1.3.9: Fix: collapsed sidebar nav buttons are now square and icon-sized.
1.3.8: Fix: the album rail's prev/next arrows work again. The card shadow now gets room inside the rail instead of switching off its overflow, which had disabled the arrows.
1.3.7: Fix: allow album-card box-shadow glow to render above album cards (overflow: visible).
Fix: star rating clipping in the queue (queue-current-info / queue-current-track-body overflow: visible).
Add breathing room for first row of album cards.
Adjust star rating SVG/size for consistent appearance.
